title: Smart Data Models - MRP BillOfMaterialsLine
description: A single component line within a Bill of Materials. Specifies the product, quantity, unit of measure, and optional scrap factor for one component needed to produce one unit of the parent product.

type.description: NGSI-LD Entity type. Must be BillOfMaterialsLine.

value.description: Position of this component in the BoM (1-based). Used to sort lines consistently.

sequence.description: Ordering sequence of this line within the Bill of Materials.

value.description: Quantity of the component required to produce exactly one unit of the parent product.

unitCode.description: UN/CEFACT unit code (e.g. EA, KGM, LTR, MTR).

value.description: Expected loss fraction (0–1). The gross requirement is quantity × (1 + scrapFactor). E.g. 0.05 means 5% extra material is ordered to cover scrap.

scrapFactor.description: Scrap factor for this component. Applied by the MRP explosion engine to compute gross material requirements.

bom.description: Reference to the parent BillOfMaterials entity this line belongs to.

component.description: Reference to the component Product consumed in this line.
